title: Beneficiary
description: A payment beneficiary in the Papaya Global Workforce Payments API. Represents an individual or organization that receives payments.

entity_type.description: Whether the beneficiary is an individual or a company

active.description: Whether the beneficiary is currently active

status.description: Current status of the beneficiary record

entity.description: Entity-specific information (structure varies by entity_type and country)

bank_details.description: Banking information (structure varies by country and currency — use /payments/beneficiaries/schema/{entity_type}/{country}/{currency} to get the correct schema)

user_tags.description: Custom key-value tags set by the user

issues.description: Any issues with the beneficiary record
